title: Update dropdown labels without modify column value?
excerpt: A need some help, I need to update labels without add or change value in the column? any idea or suggestion for that?

posts.author: Jorgemolina (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: A need some help, I need to update labels without add or change value in the column? any idea or suggestion for that?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Jorgemolina!

You can create labels and you can see the way of doing this here, but it would populate the column with the new item.

As of today there is no way of creating a new label without populating the status column.

Please let us know if you need anything else!

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
